com.tonic.jaloc.impl.array2ds

Class PLongArray2D

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.array2ds.PLongArray2D
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PLongArray2D
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.AutoCloseable
    A fixed-shape 2D long array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PLongArray2D(long rows, long columns)
      Allocates a rows x columns grid on the system allocator, zeroed.
      PLongArray2D(NativeAllocator allocator, long rows, long columns)
      Allocates a rows x columns grid on the given allocator, zeroed.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void clear()
      Clears every cell to zero.
      void close()
      Releases the backing native memory.
      long columns() 
      long get(long row, long column)
      Reads the cell at row, column.
      boolean isOpen() 
      long length() 
      long rows() 
      void set(long row, long column, long value)
      Writes the cell at row, column.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PLongArray2D

        public PLongArray2D(long rows,
                    long columns)
        Allocates a rows x columns grid on the system allocator, zeroed.
        Parameters:
        rows - the row count
        columns - the column count
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if either dimension is negative

      • PLongArray2D

        public PLongArray2D(NativeAllocator allocator,
                    long rows,
                    long columns)
        Allocates a rows x columns grid on the given allocator, zeroed.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        rows - the row count
        columns - the column count
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if either dimension is negative

    • Method Detail

      • rows

        public long rows()
        Returns:
        the row count

      • columns

        public long columns()
        Returns:
        the column count

      • length

        public long length()
        Returns:
        total cell count, rows x columns

      • isOpen

        public boolean isOpen()
        Returns:
        true until closed

      • get

        public long get(long row,
                long column)
        Reads the cell at row, column.
        Parameters:
        row - the row index
        column - the column index
        Returns:
        the cell value
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • set

        public void set(long row,
                long column,
                long value)
        Writes the cell at row, column.
        Parameters:
        row - the row index
        column - the column index
        value - the value to store
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • clear

        public void clear()
        Clears every cell to zero.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • close

        public void close()
        Releases the backing native memory. Safe to call more than once.
        Specified by:
        close in interface java.lang.AutoCloseable
